subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants of God! I shall pray on your behalf and, with the utmost humility, supplicate the threshold of His oneness, the All-Glorious Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده الهی من در حق شما دعا نمایم و بدرگاه احدیت جمال ابهی بنهایت تضرع
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
